result.stderr:
AdxUtils.Cli 2024.2.6.56
Copyright (C) 2026 Darren Fuller <darren@elastacloud.com>, Cristina Vaillant <cristina.vaillant@elastacloud.com>, Ramachandra Hegde <ram@elastacloud.com>

  -i, --ignore       Comma-separated list of tables to ignore

  -f, --function     Comma-separated list of functions or function
                     folders(followed by /) to ignore (e.g. function1,folder1/)

  -r, --rename       Comma-separated list of tables to be renamed (e.g.
                     table1=table2,table3=table4)

  -e, --export       Comma-separated list of tables to export data for

  -o, --output       (Default: .) Path for the output file to be written to

  -u, --update       Table to be updated (e.g. table=table1,columnType=int,
                     columnToAdd=column,columnToDrop=column)"

  -c, --cluster      Required. The cluster id to export from

  -d, --database     Required. Specifies the database to be exported

  --use-cli          (Group: Authentication Method) Use the Azure CLI for
                     authentication

  --client-id        (Group: Authentication Method) The application id (client
                     id) of the service principal being used for authentication

  --client-secret    The client secret of the service principal being used for
                     authentication

  --authority        The authority (e.g. contoso.com) or AAD tenant id to
                     authenticate against

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

staticCommands.name: export
staticCommands.description: Export a database schema with optional data items

options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to export data for
Comma-separated list of functions or function folders(followed by /) to ignore (e.g. function1,folder1/)
Comma-separated list of tables to ignore
Path for the output file to be written to
Comma-separated list of tables to be renamed (e.g. table1=table2,table3=table4)
Table to be updated (e.g. table=table1,columnType=int, columnToAdd=column,columnToDrop=column)"
